summary: Owns the value stream end‑to‑end, ensuring that processes, improvements, and digital systems deliver maximum value to customers and the organization.
responsibilities: Define and maintain the value stream vision, goals, and performance targets
Prioritize improvement initiatives based on customer value, ROI, and strategic alignment
Collaborate with Process Engineers to map value streams and identify bottlenecks
Ensure that CI‑OS improvements support flow, quality, and customer satisfaction
Manage the improvement backlog and coordinate cross-functional execution
Monitor value stream metrics and lead performance reviews
Represent customer needs and translate them into operational requirements
Ensure alignment between digital systems, workflows, and value delivery
Support pilots, experiments, and phased rollouts across the value stream
Facilitate collaboration between operations, quality, engineering, and leadership
authorities: Authorize resource allocation within the value stream
Escalate systemic issues to executive leadership
kaizenCapabilities: Facilitation of value stream mapping workshops
Identification of waste across functional boundaries
Support for frontline and team-level improvements
cqiCapabilities: Integration of CQI metrics into value stream dashboards
Validation of improvement impact on customer value

constraints: Decisions must align with organizational strategy
Customer value must be prioritized over local optimization
Changes must be coordinated across all affected roles
